name: IDG Energy Investment Limited
summary: IDG Energy Investment Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the energy assets investment and management activities in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the upstream oil and gas business; liquefied natural gas (LNG) liquefaction and exporting; and LNG importing, processing, and selling operations, as well as LNG logistics services. The company owns interests in upstream crude oil blocks in the United States and China; LNG export terminals in the United States and Canada; and a LNG receiving terminal in China. It also provides related energy investment fund management services; engages in the exploration, development, production, and sale of crude oil; and offers technology development and consulting, and mobility services. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. IDG Energy Investment Limited is a subsidiary of Titan Gas Technology Investment Limited.
